title: Military Police (disambiguation)
content:
'''Military Police''' can refer to several different [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement agencies]] in various military forces:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Clone military police]]''', the military police of the [[Galactic Republic]] that was part of the [[Grand Army of the Republic]].
*'''[[Imperial Army Military Police]]''', the [[Imperial Military|military]] police of the [[Galactic Empire]] that was part of the [[Imperial Army]].
*'''[[Military Police (Imperial Navy)|Military Police]]''', the military police of the Galactic Empire that was part of the [[Imperial Navy]].
*'''[[Military Police (Galactic Republic)|Military Police]]''', the [[Republic Military|military]] police of the [[Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars]].
*'''[[Shore police]]''', the law enforcement branch of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Military Police (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Military Police]]''', the [[Republic Military/Legends|military]] police of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*'''[[Imperial Military Police]]''', the [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] police of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*'''[[CompForce/Legends|CompForce]]''', the [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|political]] military police of the Galactic Empire
*'''[[Security|Alliance Security]]''', the [[Alliance Military/Legends|military]] police of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
*'''[[New Republic Military Police]]''', the [[Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic|military]] police of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
*'''[[Galactic Alliance Military Police]]''', the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|military]] police of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]
